What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

- **Node.js version**: [e.g. 18.19.0]
- **OmniVis version**: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- **Project framework**: [e.g. Next.js 14 + tRPC + Prisma]
